name: rr-menu-item
summary: A single action inside rr-menu; the host carries role=menuitem and focus is managed by the parent menu.

events.name: rr-menu-item-select
events.detail: Bubbles (composed) to rr-menu when the item is activated; detail.value is this item's value. Not fired when disabled.

rules: Never use hex values. Always use var(--color-*) semantic tokens
Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
Reserve danger for genuinely destructive actions — one per menu is the norm
Do not rely on color alone for the danger signal — the label must say what is destroyed

keyboard: Enter or Space activates the item
Focus arrives via the parent menu's roving keyboard navigation
rules: role=menuitem and tabindex=-1 live on the host so the flattened tree reads menu → menuitem
Disabled items expose aria-disabled=true and stay visible — hidden options are undiscoverable options
